## BaseXBus.emit() method

Emits an event. See [XBus.emit()](./x-components.xbus.emit_1.md)<!-- -->.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
emit<Event extends XEvent>(event: Event, payload?: XEventPayload<Event>, metadata?: WireMetadata): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  event | Event | Event to be emitted. |
|  payload | [XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;Event&gt; | Event payload. |
|  metadata | [WireMetadata](./x-components.wiremetadata.md) | Information of who emits the event. |
